items.title: Sterling leaves Chelsea by mutual consent
items.summary: Raheem Sterling leaves Chelsea by mutual consent after reaching an agreement on his departure.

items.title: Chelsea announce Sterling departure
items.summary: Raheem Sterling has left Chelsea after three-and-a-half years at the club.

items.title: FC Utrecht bereikt akkoord met Lyon en UEFA over zaak-Ghezzal
items.summary: FC Utrecht heeft een akkoord bereikt met Olympique Lyon en de UEFA over de afhandeling van de zaak-Ghezzal. De 33-jarige Algerijn zou in het Europa League-duel tussen de Utrechters en Lyon niet speelgerechtigd zijn geweest. Het onderzoek is stopgezet en Utrecht ontvangt een vergoeding.

items.title: Rodman, Hayes viral celebration caps off U.S. rout
items.summary: Trinity Rodman capped off the USWNT's 5-0 rout of Chile by coaxing coach Emma Hayes into a sideline dance, as a young American squad secured its fifth consecutive shutout Tuesday night.

items.title: Sources: Fulham, Man City agree Oscar Bobb deal
items.summary: Manchester City have agreed a fee with Fulham for winger Oscar Bobb, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Abraham joins Villa 1 day after Besiktas transfer
items.summary: Tammy Abraham has signed for Aston Villa from Besiktas just one day after he joined the Turkish club a permanent transfer from Roma.

items.title: Browns hiring Monken as head coach
items.summary: The Cleveland Browns are naming Todd Monken as their next head coach, NFL Network reported on Wednesday.

items.title: Fulham agree to sign Man City winger Bobb for £27m
items.summary: Fulham agree a £27million deal with Manchester City to sign Oscar Bobb.

items.title: Real Madrid bindt talentvolle Marcelo-telg
items.summary: Enzo Alves heeft zijn eerste professionele contract bij Real Madrid getekend. De zestienjarige aanvaller wordt gezien als een groot talent, maar geniet (vooralsnog) vooral bekendheid als de zoon van clublegende Marcelo.

items.title: Waarom Sutalo een logische keuze is tegen Olympiakos
items.summary: In VI Rondje Europa bespreken Bart Frouws, Bas van den Hoven en Pieter Zwart de keuzes van Fred Grim tegen Olympiakos Piraeus. Gezien de speelstijl van de Griekse opponent krijgt de Ajax-trainer het advies om te starten met Josip Sutalo in plaats van Aaron Bouwman.

items.title: Dit kan Ajax verwachten van Olympiakos Piraeus
items.summary: Met het verslaan van Villarreal is de Champions League-droom van Ajax nog enigszins in leven. Om van die droom realiteit te kunnen maken, is een winstpartij tegen Olympiakos cruciaal. Analyse over wat Ajax tactisch kan verwachten van zijn aankomende tegenstander én uitleg over waar het de Grieken pijn kan doen.

items.title: Fulham agree £27m deal to sign Bobb
items.summary: Fulham have agreed a £27m deal with Manchester City to sign forward Oscar Bobb.

items.title: Real Madrid gelinkt aan Neves, Fulham heeft dure Bobb bijna binnen
items.summary: De tijd van winterse versterkingen is aangebroken, in dit blog volgen we alle transferactiviteit in het buitenland. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in Nederland.

items.title: Leon Goretzka says Donald Trump ‘makes us feel not only German but European’
items.summary: Midfielder speaks out on politics before World Cup Goretzka open to summer move to England from Bayern The Germany international Leon Goretzka has said Donald Trump’s actions have left him feeling “not only German but also European”. The US president has recently threatened to take Greenland by force and called Europe “weak” and “decaying”. Goretzka, who hopes to make the Germany squad for the World Cup in the US, Canada and Mexico this summer, told Die Zeit: “Of course, I’m aware of the political debates. I still expect it to be a great tournament – it will promote football there, and show many people want an incredibly exciting game. Donald Trump makes us feel not only German but also European.” Continue reading...

items.title: West Ham agree £35.5m sale of Paqueta to Flamengo
items.summary: West Ham agree a deal to sell Brazil forward Lucas Paqueta to Flamengo for more than 41m euros (£35.5m).

items.title: West Ham seal £36.7m deal for Paquetá to join Flamengo and sign Traoré
items.summary: Winger joins from Fulham until June Ward-Prowse poised for Burnley loan Flamengo have concluded their pursuit of Lucas Paquetá by agreeing to sign the West Ham midfielder for €42m (£36.7m). Paquetá has been pushing for a return to Brazil and negotiations came to a successful end on Wednesday after Flamengo had three offers rejected. West Ham are in a relegation battle and at first tried to convince Paquetá to stay. They initially indicated they would sell the Brazil international only if Flamengo loaned him back for the rest of the season. However Paquetá has grown disillusioned with life in England and was desperate to secure an immediate move to his former club. Continue reading...

items.title: Tielemans out until April as Villa injuries mount
items.summary: Aston Villa midfielder Youri Tielemans is been ruled out for up to 10 weeks, Unai Emery has confirmed.

items.title: How to reach the Champions League knockouts: Can Man City, Chelsea avoid the playoff round?
items.summary: We're less than a week away from knowing which 24 teams advance from the league phase. Here's what's at stake with only one matchweek to go.

items.title: Galatasaray are leading Türkiye's renaissance
items.summary: Galatasaray head to Manchester City on Wednesday as one of Europe's in-form teams.

items.title: Fury's comeback fight confirmed
items.summary: Tyson Fury has confirmed his comeback fight against Arslanbek Makhmudov as the former heavyweight champion returns to boxing.
